div.t-attf-style: box-sizing: border-box; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; #{'' if page_lines_first else 'page-break-before: always;'}

table.style: width: 100%; margin: 0; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed;

th.style: width: 10%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

width: 40%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 20%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: none; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

width: 15%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 15%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000;
width: 10%; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
width: 10%; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;

td.style: text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: center; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000;

div.style: width: 100%; font-weight: regular; font-size: 12.90px; display: table; table-layout: fixed;
display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 70.1%; padding: 5px;
div.span: Accordling to general Conditions ORGALIME S2000-M2000
Cancellation : Cancellation of order is subject to charge 25% based on order value

div.style: float: left; width: 50%; font-weight: regular; white-space: pre-line;
float: left; width: 50%; font-weight: regular; white-space: pre-line;
display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 29.9%; box-sizing: border-box;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-weight: bold; table-layout: fixed;

td.style: width: 50%; text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
width: 50%; text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: left; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; border-right: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
text-align: right; height: 22px; padding: 2px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: middle;
